case_title: JANET TAPIA VS. 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TAPIA, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL ROY, TASNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, JANET
CORRESPONDENCE FROM CHARLENE R. ROSACK, ATTORNEY FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM ALL PARTIES RETAINED. MIRNA ESCOBAR INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH, SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S.VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL ROY, TASNIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2008 - CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO MAR-07-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO AGREEMENT REACHED DURING MEDIATION. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE-GRANTED. TO BE HEARD WITH CASES 824045 AND 824046. PLAINTIFF ORDERED TO HAVE SPANISH INTERPRETER AVAILABLE FOR NEXT COURT DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPIA, JANET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL ROY, TASNIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPIA, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT 124 TURK ST. LP DBA CAMELOT HOTEL
